name: @zine/trace-context
description: Pure authoring-syntax and deterministic evidence-selection kernel for Zine.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && tsx --test src/*.test.ts benchmark/*.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: npm run typecheck && node --import=tsx --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=92 --test-coverage-branches=75 --test-coverage-functions=95 --test-coverage-include=src/**/*.ts --test-coverage-exclude=src/**/*.test.ts src/*.test.ts benchmark/*.test.ts
